title: GravityInput
description: Input for predicted original gravity. Sums the fermentable contributions, applies brewhouse efficiency to mash-derived sugars only.

batch_size_l.description: Post-boil wort volume in liters (cooled, into fermenter).

efficiency_pct.description: Brewhouse efficiency as a percent (e.g. 75 means 75%). Applied only to mash-derived fermentables.

yield_pct.description: Fine-grind yield as a percent of sucrose. Typical: 75-85% for base malts.

category.description: Whether this fermentable is mashed (efficiency applies) or extract/sugar (no loss).
